translation: def _createTime(zone: tzinfo, time: int, millisecond: int) -> datetime:
calendar = pytz.timezone('UTC').localize(datetime.utcnow()) if zone is None else pytz.timezone(str(zone)).localize(datetime.utcnow())
calendar = calendar.replace(year=1970, month=1, day=1, hour=(hour // 10000), minute=(min // 100), second=sec, microsecond=millisecond*1000)
